title: Zhe Zhai
text: I am an Assistant Professor of Economics in the School of Business at the Macau University of Science and Technology, with a Ph.D. in Economics from the Georgia Institute of Technology. My research is in applied microeconomics — innovation and firm strategy, labor markets, and corporate finance — with recent work on corporate green innovation.

title: Research
text: Innovation · Firm strategy · Organizational behavior · Labor demand and supply · Corporate finance · Globalization · Environmental economics.

title: Research
text: Innovation · Firm strategy · Organizational behavior · Labor demand and supply · Corporate finance · Globalization · Environmental economics.

title: Research
text:
Publications


McCarthy, P., & Zhai, Z. (2019). Economic impact analysis of GDOT short line railroad infrastructure investment in Georgia. Research in Transportation Economics, 77, 100728. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.retrec.2019.05.001


Tian, X., Gong, J., & Zhai, Z. (2022a). Natural disasters and human capital accumulation: Evidence from the 1976 Tangshan earthquake. Economics of Education Review, 90, 102304. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.econedurev.2022.102304


Tian, X., Gong, J., & Zhai, Z. (2022b). The effect of job displacement on labor market outcomes: Evidence from the Chinese state-owned enterprise reform. China Economic Review, 72, 101743. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chieco.2022.101743


Zhai, Z. (2026). Board gender diversity and environmental innovation: The role of time horizons and SEW in Chinese family firms. Frontiers in Sustainability, 6, 1714107. https://doi.org/10.3389/frsus.2025.1714107


Zhai, Z., & Ghosal, V. (2022). Internationalization of innovation and firm performance in the pharmaceutical industry. International Review of Economics & Finance, 80, 882–905. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.iref.2022.02.058


翟喆. (2009). 中国税制改革中的遗产税. 现代经济信息, (24), 98.


翟喆. (2010a). 再探“强生门”迷雾. 现代商业, (7), 276–277.


翟喆. (2010b). 宝钢收购新钢的并购方案筹划及影响预测. 财会研究, (21), 60–62.

title: Welcome
text:
This is the home for short notes and longer pieces on my research and on economics more broadly — the economics of innovation, firm strategy, labor markets, and corporate finance.
New posts will appear here. To write one, I add a folder under posts/ with an index.qmd — or just tell Claude the idea and it drafts and publishes it.
